tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"p=$(command -v hping3 2>/dev/null); if [ -n \"$p\" ]; then echo \"FOUND:$p\"; mv -v \"$p\" \"${p}.disabled\" && chmod 000 \"${p}.disabled\"; echo \"MOVED and CHMODDED\"; else echo \"NOT_FOUND\"; fi; if command -v hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo \"ERROR: hping3 still available\"; else echo \"SUCCESS: hping3 disabled\"; fi; ls -l \"${p}.disabled\" 2>/dev/null || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
p=$(command -v hping3 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pp" ]; then echo "FOUND:$p"; mv -v "$p" "${p}.disabled" && chmod 000 "${p}.disableed"; echo "MOVED and CHMODDED"; else echo "NOT_FOUND"; fi; if command -v hping3 >>/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "ERROR: hping3 still available"; else echo "SUCCESS: hhping3 disabled"; fi; ls -l "${p}.disabled" 2>/dev/null || true
FOUND:/usr/sbin/hping3
renamed '/usr/sbin/hping3' -> '/usr/sbin/hping3.disabled'
MOVED and CHMODDED
SUCCESS: hping3 disabled
---------- 1 root root 141784 Apr  1  2024 /usr/sbin/hping3.disabled
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
